creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
If xfce4-session-4.6.1_4 is installed, it becomes virtually impossible to start Xfce4. It might start once every twenty or 
so times; however, there is no guarantee that it will. The SPLASH screen will appear, and the mouse cursor is visable. Some 
text is printed at the bottom of the screen and then it crashes. This problem has been reported by other users as well.

I have attached a copy of the logged attempt to start Xfce4.

Fix: Presently, the only way around the problem is to delete the xfce4-session-4.6.1_4 package.
How-To-Repeat: 
Install Xfce4 with xfce4-session-4.6.1_4 and attempt to start it.
